src: A fluffy black and white dog with pointed ears, wearing a harness. Its coat is white with black patches. The dog has a lively expression, attentive eyes, a wagging tail, and an open mouth with a hanging tongue.
edit: An animated dog-shaped balloon with a glossy surface in vibrant colors, featuring shiny reflective blue and white patches. It has inflated ears, small round black eyes, a swaying tail, and a string attaching it to the ground.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is viewed from above, running towards the camera on fallen leaves in a park, surrounded by green shrubs. The gray and white dog has its head slightly left, tail raised, under dappled sunlight.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object sits on a paved path lined with tall trees, facing forward with its tongue out and a leash on its collar. The path flanked by foliage stretches into the distance, creating depth.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The dog is lying with front paws crossed on a white surface indoors, blurred beige and brown background, head slightly tilted right, ears perked up, soft light on its face.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object is viewed from above running towards the camera in a field of purple flowers and greenery, its head turned right, tail upward. The densely packed flowers contrast with the dog's fur under bright daylight.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object lies on a patterned gray and white blanket with its head turned to the right, showing its profile. Both ears are up, set against a softly lit gray background with light shadows.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: A dog viewed from above, running towards the camera on freshly fallen snow in a park, surrounded by bare shrubs. The gray and white dog has its head turned left with its tail raised. Winter sunlight filters through leafless trees overhead.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is on a snow-covered path lined with tall, frost-laden trees. A dog faces forward with tongue out, breath forming small clouds, leash attached and lying on the snow, creating depth in the winter avenue.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The dog is lying with its front paws crossed on a snow-covered surface, indoors with a blurred background of frosty white and icy blue tones. Its head is tilted to the right, ears perked up, and highlighted by chilly light.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object is viewed from above, running towards the camera in a field of frosty purple flowers and snow-dusted greenery. Its head is turned slightly right, tail curved upward, in a colorful natural setting under wintry daylight.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object rests on a snowflake-patterned, gray and white blanket, head turned right in profile, ears tall and alert. The background is soft frosty gray, illuminated from one side, with winter shadows.
